title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building the infrastructure and rules around an AI agent, not just the model itself. It operates at two levels: the AI layer within a single session (rules, skills, hooks, subagents) and orchestration of multiple agent sessions into workflows. The approach treats every model mistake as an opportunity to refine the harness layer.
